# 职业详解 / Classes Guide

暗黑破坏神4当前共有6个职业，每个都有独特的资源系统、技能体系和流派方向。本章详解每个职业的核心机制和主流玩法 / Diablo 4 currently has 6 classes, each with unique resource systems, skill trees, and build directions. This chapter covers every class's core mechanics and meta builds.

---

## 1. 野蛮人 / Barbarian

**资源 / Resource**: 怒气（Fury）—— 攻击产生怒气，技能消耗怒气 / Fury — generated by attacking, consumed by skills

**特色机制 / Class Mechanic**: 武器库系统（Arsenal System）——可装备4把武器（2把单手+1把双手钝器+1把双手利器），不同技能自动切换到最佳武器 / Equip 4 weapons (2 one-hand + 1 two-hand blunt + 1 two-hand slash), skills auto-switch to the best weapon

### 核心流派 / Meta Builds

| 流派 / Build | 强度 / Power | 玩法 / Playstyle |
|------|:----:|------|
| **猛击蛮 / Bash Barbarian** | ★★★★★ | 利用**猛击**叠加伤害，配合**战略**触发爆炸性AOE / Stack damage with Bash, trigger explosive AoE with Tactical |
| **旋风蛮 / Whirlwind Barbarian** | ★★★★☆ | 经典转转转，配合**易伤**和**流血**持续输出 / Classic spin-to-win with Vulnerable and Bleed |
| **先祖锤蛮 / Hammer of the Ancients** | ★★★★★ | 高爆发单体输出，一锤秒精英 / Massive single-target burst, one-shot elites |
| **荆棘蛮 / Thorns Barbarian** | ★★★☆☆ | 堆荆棘+生命，站着让怪自己打死自己 / Stack Thorns + HP, let enemies kill themselves |

**关键威能 / Key Aspects**:
- **无尽怒火 / Aspect of Limitless Rage**：怒气上限提升 / Increase Fury cap
- **无厌狂怒 / Aspect of Anemia**：对流血敌人触发额外效果 / Bonus effects vs Bleeding enemies
- **狂暴撕裂 / Aspect of Berserk Ripping**：狂暴状态下造成额外流血 / Extra Bleed while Berserking

### 核心被动 / Key Passives

| 被动 / Passive | 效果 / Effect |
|------|------|
| **狂暴 / Berserking** | 造成/受到伤害+25%，移速+30%。野蛮人的核心增益状态 / +25% dmg dealt/taken, +30% move speed. Core Barbarian buff |
| **无坚不摧 / Unconstrained** | 狂暴效果提升至+35%伤害 / Berserking bonus increased to +35% damage |
| **重击 / Pressure Point** | 对易伤敌人暴击率提升 / Increased crit chance vs Vulnerable enemies |

---

## 2. 法师 / Sorcerer

**资源 / Resource**: 法力（Mana）—— 自动缓慢回复，技能消耗法力 / Mana — auto-regenerates slowly, skills cost mana

**特色机制 / Class Mechanic**: 附魔系统（Enchantment System）——可将一个技能放入附魔槽，获得常驻被动效果 / Slot a skill into the Enchantment slot for a permanent passive effect

### 核心流派 / Meta Builds

| 流派 / Build | 强度 / Power | 玩法 / Playstyle |
|------|:----:|------|
| **冰封球法 / Frozen Orb Sorcerer** | ★★★★★ | 核心输出**冰封球**，配合冰霜新星冻住一切 / Core skill Frozen Orb + Frost Nova for perma-freeze |
| **连锁闪电法 / Chain Lightning Sorcerer** | ★★★★☆ | **连锁闪电**弹射清屏，适合速刷 / Bouncing Chain Lightning for fast clears |
| **火墙法 / Firewall Sorcerer** | ★★★★★ | 满地火墙持续灼烧，配合燃烧增伤 / AoE fire walls with constant Burning damage |
| **暴风雪法 / Blizzard Sorcerer** | ★★★★☆ | 暴风雪控场+配合冰刺威能打爆发 / Blizzard CC + Ice Spikes Aspect for burst |

**关键威能 / Key Aspects**:
- **无限法袍 / Raiment of the Infinite**：传送术拉怪+眩晕 / Teleport pulls + stuns enemies
- **冰心 / Iceheart Brais**：冻死敌人触发冰霜新星 / Frozen enemy kills trigger Frost Nova
- **星火 / Starfire**：连锁闪电对远处的敌人造成额外伤害 / Chain Lightning bonus damage to distant enemies

### 附魔推荐 / Enchantment Recommendations

| 技能附魔 / Skill Enchantment | 效果 / Effect |
|------|------|
| **冰霜新星 / Frost Nova** | 每20秒自动释放一次冰霜新星 / Auto-casts Frost Nova every 20 seconds |
| **火球 / Fireball** | 击杀敌人时产生爆炸（造成火焰伤害）/ Enemies explode on kill (Fire damage) |
| **闪电长矛 / Lightning Spear** | 每X秒自动生成闪电长矛攻击附近敌人 / Auto-generates Lightning Spears periodically |

---

## 3. 德鲁伊 / Druid

**资源 / Resource**: 灵力（Spirit）—— 攻击产生，技能消耗 / Spirit — generated by attacks, consumed by skills

**特色机制 / Class Mechanic**: 变形精通——可在人形、熊人、狼人三种形态间切换。不同形态有不同的技能和被动加成 / Shapeshift between Human, Werebear, and Werewolf forms, each with unique skills and passives

### 核心流派 / Meta Builds

| 流派 / Build | 强度 / Power | 玩法 / Playstyle |
|------|:----:|------|
| **山崩德 / Landslide Druid** | ★★★★★ | **山崩**配合**大地尖刺**，一次性触发复数地裂造成毁灭性伤害 / Landslide + Earth Spike for multi-hit devastation |
| **风暴狼 / Storm Wolf** | ★★★★★ | 狼人形态下释放风暴技能，攻速极快+暴击拉满 / Storm skills in Werewolf form for max attack speed + crit |
| **碎石德 / Pulverize Druid** | ★★★★☆ | 熊人形态大范围AOE拍地，简单粗暴 / Werebear AoE ground-pound — simple and effective |
| **龙卷风德 / Tornado Druid** | ★★★☆☆ | 龙卷风追踪敌人，配合独特装备获得极高单目标伤害 / Tracking tornadoes with unique gear for extreme single-target |

**独特装备 / Key Uniques**:
- **狼头 / Tempest Roar**：风暴狼核心——使狼人技能获得风暴标签 / Storm Wolf core — Werewolf skills gain Storm tag
- **大地之戒 / Ring of the Unsung Ascetic's**：山崩德核心——额外山崩触发 / Landslide core — extra Landslide triggers
- **北极星 / Vasily's Prayer**：熊人核心——大地技能获得熊人标签 / Werebear core — Earth skills gain Werebear tag

---

## 4. 游侠 / Rogue

**资源 / Resource**: 能量（Energy）—— 自动回复较快，技能消耗能量 / Energy — fast auto-regen, skills cost energy

**特色机制 / Class Mechanic**: 专精系统（Specialization）——30级后解锁，可在三种专精间选择 / Unlock at level 30, choose between 3 specializations:

| 专精 / Specialization | 效果 / Effect |
|------|------|
| **暗影步 / Shadow Step** | 每次击杀生成暗影分身 / Shadow Clones on kill |
| **预备 / Preparation** | 终极技能冷却-50% + 可以使用更多终极技能充能 / Ultimate skill cooldown reduced by 50% + extra charges |
| **精准 / Precision** | 每第3次核心技能必定暴击 / Every 3rd core skill crits guaranteed |

### 核心流派 / Meta Builds

| 流派 / Build | 强度 / Power | 玩法 / Playstyle |
|------|:----:|------|
| **穿透射击 / Penetrating Shot** | ★★★★★ | **穿透射击**AOE清屏，配合暗影灌注爆炸清场 / Penetrating Shot AoE with Shadow Imbuement explosions |
| **快速射击 / Rapid Fire** | ★★★★☆ | 单体爆发极高，配合毒素灌注打BOSS / Extreme single-target burst with Poison Imbuement for bosses |
| **死亡陷阱 / Death Trap** | ★★★★★ | **死亡陷阱**聚怪+刷新，循环释放 / Death Trap groups + resets, continuous looping |
| **刃舞 / Dance of Blades** | ★★★★☆ | 旋转刀刃近战流派，高机动性和持续AOE / Spinning blades melee build with high mobility and sustained AoE |

**关键灌注 / Key Imbuements**:
- **暗影灌注 / Shadow Imbuement**：击杀时爆炸，适合AOE清怪 / On-kill explosions, great for AoE
- **毒素灌注 / Poison Imbuement**：叠加中毒DOT，适合打BOSS / Stacking poison DoT, great for bosses
- **冰冷灌注 / Cold Imbuement**：冻住敌人，提供控场 / Freeze enemies for CC

---

## 5. 死灵法师 / Necromancer

**资源 / Resource**: 骸精（Essence）—— 攻击产生，技能消耗 / Essence — generated by attacks, consumed by skills

**特色机制 / Class Mechanic**: 仆从系统（Minion System）——可召唤骷髅战士、骷髅法师和傀儡，组成亡灵大军 / Summon Skeletal Warriors, Skeletal Mages, and a Golem for an undead army

### 核心流派 / Meta Builds

| 流派 / Build | 强度 / Power | 玩法 / Playstyle |
|------|:----:|------|
| **骨矛灵 / Bone Spear Necromancer** | ★★★★★ | **骨矛**穿透敌人，配合暴击造成天文数字伤害 / Bone Spear pierces enemies with insane crit damage |
| **暗影DOT / Shadow DoT Necromancer** | ★★★★☆ | 暗影持续伤害叠层，配合枯萎技能大范围传染 / Shadow damage-over-time stacking with Blight contagion |
| **血涌 / Blood Surge Necromancer** | ★★★★★ | 大范围鲜血AOE + 吸取生命，站撸之王 / Massive Blood AoE + life steal — the sustain king |
| **召唤流 / Summonmancer** | ★★★☆☆ | 纯仆从流派，看亡灵大军碾压一切 / Pure minion build — watch your undead army overwhelm everything |

**核心书卷 / Key Book of the Dead**:

| 仆从 / Minion | 升级选择 / Upgrade Choices |
|------|------|
| **骷髅战士 / Skeletal Warriors** | 防御（反伤）/ 掠食者（攻速）/ 骷髅祭司（重生）/ Defenders (thorns) / Reapers (attack speed) / Skirmishers (revive) |
| **骷髅法师 / Skeletal Mages** | 暗影（减速）/ 寒冷（冰冻）/ 骸骨（额外伤害）/ Shadow (slow) / Cold (freeze) / Bone (bonus dmg) |
| **傀儡 / Golem** | 骸骨（嘲讽）/ 鲜血（吸血）/ 钢铁（AOE）/ Bone (taunt) / Blood (lifesteal) / Iron (AoE) |

---

## 6. 魂灵师 / Spiritborn

**资源 / Resource**: 灵量（Vigor）—— 攻击产生，技能消耗。类似游侠的能量系统，回复速度极快 / Vigor — generated by attacks, consumed by skills. Fast regen similar to Rogue's Energy.

**特色机制 / Class Mechanic**: 四灵之力——魂灵师可以引导四种守护之灵的力量，每种提供独特的加成 / Channel four Spirit Guardians, each granting unique bonuses:

| 守护灵 / Spirit Guardian | 效果 / Effect |
|------|------|
| **豹灵 / Jaguar** | 攻速与暴击 / Attack speed and critical strike |
| **鹰灵 / Eagle** | 移速与闪避 / Movement speed and evasion |
| **猿灵 / Gorilla** | 防御与生命 / Defense and max HP |
| **蜈蚣灵 / Centipede** | 毒素与持续伤害 / Poison and damage over time |

### 核心流派 / Meta Builds

| 流派 / Build | 强度 / Power | 玩法 / Playstyle |
|------|:----:|------|
| **豹击流 / Jaguar Evade** | ★★★★★ | 极致攻速+闪避，高频打击碾压一切 / Max attack speed + evade spam, overwhelm with rapid hits |
| **鹰隼狙击 / Eagle Sniper** | ★★★★★ | 远程高暴击精准射击，一标秒精英 / Long-range precise crit shots, one-shot elites |
| **猿盾 / Gorilla Tank** | ★★★★☆ | 超高防御+嘲讽，团队坦克首选 / Extreme defense + taunt — the ultimate group tank |
| **万毒缠身 / Centipede Plague** | ★★★★☆ | 毒素叠加+传染，打BOSS时DOT达到骇人高度 / Poison stacking + contagion, insane boss DoT |

**资料片特有 / Expansion Exclusive**：魂灵师仅在**憎恨之躯**资料片中可用 / Spiritborn is exclusive to the **Vessel of Hatred** expansion

---

## 职业强度评级 / Class Tier List (Season 8)

| 评级 / Tier | 职业 / Class |
|:----:|------|
| **S** | 魂灵师 / Spiritborn |
| **A** | 死灵法师 / Necromancer, 野蛮人 / Barbarian |
| **B** | 法师 / Sorcerer, 游侠 / Rogue |
| **C** | 德鲁伊 / Druid |

> 注：强度评级随赛季补丁变化，以上为第8赛季大致参考 / Note: Tier lists change with each season patch — this is approximate for Season 8
